touches.ai_summary: Initial outbound email to Santiago Watson introducing our platform's onboarding automation capabilities for vertical SaaS companies. Highlighted ROI potential and referenced similar success with mid-market vertical SaaS firms.
next_steps: Santiago expressed interest in learning more about automation workflows

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Santiago with case study from similar vertical SaaS company. Santiago responded asking about implementation timeline and team requirements.

questions_asked.question: What does a typical implementation timeline look like for a company our size?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks for mid-market vertical SaaS companies, with most automation workflows live within the first 3 weeks

next_steps: Schedule qualification call to discuss specific use cases

touches.ai_summary: 15-minute qualification call with Santiago Watson. Discussed CoreDynamics' current onboarding challenges, manual processes causing delays, and need to scale without adding headcount. Santiago confirmed budget authority and mentioned involving COO Diego Friedman in later stages.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need for onboarding automation right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're onboarding 30-40 new customers monthly and our current manual process doesn't scale. Implementation team is overwhelmed.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and support tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs and can connect via API to custom tools

next_steps: Santiago to share current onboarding workflow documentation
Schedule discovery call with Implementation Lead

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with integration documentation and ROI calculator based on their 30-40 monthly onboardings. Santiago confirmed receipt and mentioned bringing in Camila Ahmed from implementation team for technical evaluation.
next_steps: Schedule discovery call with Camila Ahmed for technical deep-dive

touches.ai_summary: Email sent to schedule demo with both Santiago and Camila. Santiago responded suggesting to include Finn Johnson from account management team as he'll be a key end user of the automation workflows.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation workflows for different customer segments?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - the unlimited automation tier allows for segment-specific workflows with custom triggers and actions

next_steps: Schedule demo for Santiago, Camila, and Finn

touches.ai_summary: Demo confirmation email sent with agenda covering workflow automation, integration capabilities, and customization options. All three stakeholders confirmed attendance.
next_steps: Send pre-demo questionnaire to Camila for technical requirements

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email with recording and custom proposal based on 16 seats with unlimited automation tier. Santiago responded positively, mentioning they want to move quickly and requesting pricing options.
next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing breakdown
Santiago to review with Diego Friedman

touches.ai_summary: Formal proposal sent for $14,800 ACV (16 seats, unlimited automation). Santiago acknowledged receipt and mentioned scheduling internal review meeting with Diego Friedman and finance team to finalize budget approval.
next_steps: Santiago to complete internal review by end of week
Schedule pricing call to address any questions

touches.ai_summary: 20-minute pricing call with Santiago to review proposal details and implementation plan. Discussed payment terms and contract length. Santiago confirmed budget approval and wants to move to annual contract for better pricing.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on annual vs quarterly payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can offer quarterly payments with annual commitment at the same rate

questions_asked.question: What's your target go-live date for the automation workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within 6 weeks - we have a new product launch in Q3 that will drive customer volume

next_steps: Revise proposal with quarterly payment terms
Schedule exec alignment call with Diego Friedman

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute executive alignment meeting with Diego Friedman and Santiago Watson. Diego confirmed strategic importance of onboarding automation for scaling operations. Discussed success metrics, implementation support, and ROI expectations. Diego gave verbal approval to proceed with contract.

questions_asked.question: What level of implementation support is included, and what does premium support look like?
questions_asked.answer: Standard tier includes dedicated implementation manager and email support. Premium adds 24/7 phone support and quarterly business reviews.

questions_asked.question: How do you measure success in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: We track automation adoption rate, time-to-onboard reduction, and manual task elimination. Typical customers see 40-50% reduction in onboarding time within first quarter.

questions_asked.question: Are there any other stakeholders we should involve before finalizing the contract?
questions_asked.answer: No, Santiago and I have authority to move forward. Legal will review the contract but shouldn't be any blockers.

next_steps: Send final contract with quarterly payment terms
Diego to route to legal for review
Target signature by end of week
